sectionSub: A cross-section of tools and habits I use to ship, refine, and collaborate — mixed the way real projects feel.

skills.title: Socket.io
skills.description: Rooms, fallbacks, and evented APIs for realtime features.

skills.title: Problem-solving & analytics
skills.description: Framing messy goals into measurable steps and clear tradeoffs.

skills.title: Project management
skills.description: Roadmaps, stakeholders, and keeping delivery predictable.

skills.title: Team leadership
skills.description: Aligning people on scope, quality, and pace without losing empathy.

skills.title: Next.js
skills.description: Routing, SSR/SSG, and production-ready React apps.

skills.title: Attention to detail
skills.description: Edge cases, copy, and visuals that signal care in the product.

skills.title: Express.js
skills.description: Lean HTTP APIs, middleware pipelines, and sensible defaults.

skills.title: Quick adaptation
skills.description: Picking up new stacks, domains, and constraints without losing momentum.

skills.title: Performance optimization
skills.description: Profiling, bundle discipline, and UX that stays fast under load.

skills.title: Creativity
skills.description: Exploring alternatives when the obvious path is blocked or boring.

skills.title: MongoDB
skills.description: Document modeling, indexing, and pragmatic data shapes.

skills.title: React.js
skills.description: Component-driven UIs, hooks, and performance-minded rendering.

skills.title: Prisma
skills.description: Type-safe data access and migrations without losing SQL power.

skills.title: React Native
skills.description: Shared patterns across web and mobile with native polish where it counts.

skills.title: SQL
skills.description: Relational modeling, joins, and queries that stay explainable.

skills.title: Node.js
skills.description: Services, tooling, and I/O-heavy work on a familiar JS runtime.

skills.title: PHP
skills.description: Legacy-friendly backends and pragmatic server-side scripting.

skills.title: TypeScript
skills.description: Types that catch regressions early and document intent in code.

skills.title: Firebase
skills.description: Auth, hosting, and BaaS pieces for fast iteration and small teams.

skills.title: Flutter
skills.description: Cross-platform UI with consistent layout and animation primitives.

skills.title: UI animation & motion
skills.description: Motion that guides attention instead of distracting from tasks.

skills.title: Blitz.js
skills.description: Full-stack React conventions and rapid feature scaffolding.

skills.title: WebSockets
skills.description: Live updates, presence, and low-latency client–server streams.

skills.title: WebRTC
skills.description: Peer connections, media tracks, and real-time collaboration patterns.
